final:
// // This module implements a combinational logic circuit that produces a single output X, which is LOW if all input pairs (A1, A2), (B1, B2), and (C1, C2) are LOW.
module top_module(
    input A1,
    input A2,
    input B1,
    input B2,
    input C1,
    input C2,
    output reg X
);always @(*) begin
        X = (A1 & A2) | (B1 & B2) | (C1 & C2);
    end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a combinational logic circuit that produces a single output X, which is LOW if all input pairs (A1, A2), (B1, B2), and (C1, C2) are LOW.
